subject: Status review: labrador milestone in Auckland | Nikola Tesla | Q4 review | INIT-3937
body: Team, we are aligning the next phase of labrador work in Auckland. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Prepare a fallback plan if integration testing slips beyond schedule. Comparative note includes Nikola Tesla and Frida Kahlo as historical analogs. Reference initiative INIT-3937. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: planning, coordination.
